text.title: Context Window Curation Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "task assigned to agent" to "bundle handed to agent, ready to edit".

step.name: scope
step.action: Confirm task is bounded (one feature/bug/refactor). If task is "improve the codebase" or "review everything", abort — curation does not apply.
step.decision-gate: If scope is exploratory — STOP, verdict block-no-scope.

step.name: pick-files
step.action: Identify target file(s). Walk imports/refs; pick up to 2 highest-coupling callers + referenced types. Add the most-specific AGENTS.md.
step.decision-gate: If > 2 callers needed, the change scope is too broad — re-scope.

step.name: glossary
step.action: Add a 100–200-token glossary excerpt focused on the task's domain. Reuse the project's master glossary if available.
step.decision-gate: If no glossary exists — author one inline; commit master glossary to repo afterwards.

step.name: budget-check
step.action: Sum tokens. If total > budget_tokens: drop a caller, trim AGENTS.md to the most-specific level, or split the task. Never drop AGENTS.md or glossary.
step.decision-gate: If can't fit even after trimming — STOP, split task. verdict block-over-budget.

step.name: emit-bundle
step.action: Compose bundle JSON. Validate against schema. Hand to agent as initial-context. Record exclusions list for reviewer.
